[2018-05-19 17:18] vianardene: So I can't help but notice that there are a lot of pepes emotes for the server. There are of course players from all kinds of backgrounds and I don't have a problem with that, but having those emotes as part of the official discord does strike me as worrying. Enough that I don't feel particularly comfortable being in the discord which bleeds over some into the game itself. I haven't had any issues with being harassed yet fortunately, but the pepe stuff is a pretty giant red flag. Thoughts?
[2018-05-19 17:21] vianardene: I mean, if there is an intentional choice to cater specifically to alt-right folk here I can accept that it's not my community and simply won't be at any point. I don't want to assume that though, as I know that pepe hasn't always been a political statement or maybe even means something else in this small of a community.
[2018-05-19 17:21] darwins_birdo (darwin's birdo): It's kind of a nerd thing that some nerds have pushed into the mainstream for various reasons
[2018-05-19 17:22] darwins_birdo (darwin's birdo): Some of them are alt-right basement dwellers, as expected
[2018-05-19 17:23] darwins_birdo (darwin's birdo): The association with the political movement isn't good
[2018-05-19 17:23] vianardene: I get that. Optimistically, I want to think that he's there because pepe was a fun meme and that's about all there is to it
[2018-05-19 17:24] crash_overlord: How did FeelsBadMan and monkaS become symbols of the fucking alt-right :NotLikeThis:
[2018-05-19 17:24] darwins_birdo (darwin's birdo): They appropriated them by using them a lot
[2018-05-19 17:24] vianardene: I know, it sucks ass.
[2018-05-19 17:24] darwins_birdo (darwin's birdo): Swastika is a symbol of peace
[2018-05-19 17:24] darwins_birdo (darwin's birdo): But you can't use it now
[2018-05-19 17:24] crash_overlord: They looks slightly different
[2018-05-19 17:25] Deleted User (Deleted User): nice chat about competitive prismata going on
[2018-05-19 17:25] darwins_birdo (darwin's birdo): Vivo asked if it was okay, @Deleted User
[2018-05-19 17:25] vianardene: I mean, for what it's worth I asked where to put this before I started. There isn't a meta channel.
[2018-05-19 17:26] wilson0862 (Wilson): A mod specifically said it was fine.
[2018-05-19 17:26] wilson0862 (Wilson): Thanks for your concern though.
[2018-05-19 17:27] wilson0862 (Wilson): Honestly though, in this community, pepe is nothing but a funny looking frog meme.
[2018-05-19 17:28] darwins_birdo (darwin's birdo): Yeah, I think some context is appropriate, especially with pepe
[2018-05-19 17:28] manuanti: Guys why a lot of player play this game?
[2018-05-19 17:29] darwins_birdo (darwin's birdo): It's a refreshing take on the oversaturated card game market
[2018-05-19 17:29] manuanti: I mean is different but he got like over 40k player on
[2018-05-19 17:29] crash_overlord: But yes, the "pepe" emotes are all ones that "originited" or well, spread through twitch. And since twitch is how this community got together we've basically adopted some of it onto the discord aswell
[2018-05-19 17:29] wilson0862 (Wilson): They are having a free weekend.
[2018-05-19 17:29] jugornot (Jug Or Not 👺): When does the tournament sign up stop? also how many people can play
[2018-05-19 17:30] wilson0862 (Wilson): Have you tried checking the challonge page for the tournament? That sounds like something it would answer.
[2018-05-19 17:30] crash_overlord: Once the game probably goes completely f2p we'll have to get rid of them simply for PC sake, but I really would've loved if It wouldn't have to come to that
[2018-05-19 17:31] darwins_birdo (darwin's birdo): You certainly don't want to attract pepe day traders
[2018-05-19 17:31] jugornot (Jug Or Not 👺): Why get rid of pepe? FeelsWeirdMan
[2018-05-19 17:31] vianardene: I appreciate y'all taking the topic seriously by the way. We're living in odd times lately. I'm fine with that answer and I'm not concerned anymore after talking, but I could also have seen a different reality in which I joined the discord when I first started playing and would have just left without bothering to ask.
[2018-05-19 17:32] crash_overlord: Funny looking frog :EGGERS:
[2018-05-19 17:32] darwins_birdo (darwin's birdo): Pepe has been pretty niche and didn't break into the main-stream media until the political stuff
[2018-05-19 17:32] darwins_birdo (darwin's birdo): So that's why the connotation is sticking
[2018-05-19 17:32] darwins_birdo (darwin's birdo): It's dumb, but that's what the angry nerds chose to troll with
[2018-05-19 17:32] crash_overlord: It's been used on twitch for much longer though :FeelsBadMan:
[2018-05-19 17:32] vianardene: To people aware of alt-right communities but not a part of them, it's sorta like a territory marker. It's not as bad as having kekestan flags or any of that stuff, but it's enough to double take
[2018-05-19 17:33] darwins_birdo (darwin's birdo): They should have gone with the trollface meme that no one likes anymore anyway
[2018-05-19 17:33] vianardene: I miss the days of pepe's innocence
[2018-05-19 17:33] crash_overlord: Its ok, hopefully once more prismata content is released we'll actually have good prismata emotes :LongNoseLiar:
[2018-05-19 17:34] awaclus: well, if we removed Pepe, that would be kind of like acknowledging the alt-right connotations which we probably don't want to do if we're using Pepe
[2018-05-19 17:34] crash_overlord: There's only ~3-4 usable ones right now :ReigeRage:
[2018-05-19 17:34] crash_overlord: Doesn't quite work that way.
[2018-05-19 17:34] jugornot (Jug Or Not 👺): Why does it matter if alt right uses pepe or not . Pepe emotes show emotions and feelings and are fun . If alt right started using 😃 and 😂 everyone should stop using them too?
[2018-05-19 17:35] vianardene: @Awaclus I think that's a somewhat valid concern if you want to maybe reclaim it, but we're sorta talking a 500 person community trying to reclaim a meaning that's in the 6 digit strong or so territory. Maybe even 7 digit
[2018-05-19 17:35] crash_overlord: ^ My personal stance but yeah, comes down to how much "confusion" /"offence" people take and what elyot wants to do. :FeelsBadMan:
[2018-05-19 17:36] darwins_birdo (darwin's birdo): Yeah, we don't get to choose which things become offensive sometimes. Even if it's annoying.
[2018-05-19 17:36] jugornot (Jug Or Not 👺): Do you use betterdiscord? It has a lot of emotes and you can see pepe emotes without having them on the server
[2018-05-19 17:36] crash_overlord: The old days of being a private discord :HUGGERS:
[2018-05-19 17:36] darwins_birdo (darwin's birdo): So you can have a secret meme convo that no one can see
[2018-05-19 17:39] totally_not_fbi (Totally Not FBI): We have the third monika her now, havent we
